description: List of books, possibly from a physician's library. The books include Al-Majūsī, Al-kāmil fī al-ṣinā‘a; a commentary on Megillat Esther; a Pentateuch; a prayer-book; a commentary on Ruth; a copy of the Song of Songs; and a codex with no title. (Information from CUDL.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
